fields.description: The stenciled identifier on the physical unit, e.g. IND-2042. This is also the record name.
fields.label: System Serial

fields.description: Lifecycle within Plus One's tracking. Beyond Installed, the unit's state lives in Salesforce and is maintained by Support.
fields.label: Status
fields.options:
At Builder
Ready for Ship
Shipped
Installed

fields.description: Timestamp of As-Built acceptance — the moment this Instance came into existence.
fields.label: Born At

fields.description: Actual build/completion date. For backfill units this is the on-site date; for normal-flow units born_at is the authoritative timestamp.
fields.label: Build Date

fields.description: Immutable links to the documents that produced this Instance. These are the audit trail.
fields.label: Provenance

fields.description: The immutable birth certificate. Read this to see exactly what was built.
fields.label: As-Built Record

fields.description: Which tranche allocated this serial. Useful for tracing a unit back to its production run.
fields.label: Source Tranche

fields.description: Customer at delivery. Editable — if the unit is reassigned before shipment, update here.
fields.label: Customer

fields.description: Free-form label carried forward from the Build.
fields.label: Customer Project Label

fields.description: Stamp when status transitions to Shipped.
fields.label: Shipped At

fields.description: Stamp when status transitions to Installed. After this point, Support owns the unit's state in Salesforce.
fields.label: Installed At

fields.description: Free-text site name, e.g. "UPS Worldport". No link to Physical Location for now.
fields.label: Deployment Site

fields.description: Snapshot of as-delivered configuration, captured at birth. For the authoritative as-built BOM, open the As-Built Record.
fields.label: Configuration Summary

fields.description: Human-readable list of selected options at delivery. Populated at birth, frozen thereafter.
fields.label: Configuration Summary

fields.description: Where this Instance lives once it leaves Plus One's manufacturing scope.
fields.label: Downstream Handoff

fields.description: Populate when the corresponding Salesforce Asset is created. Today this is manual; future automation can sync this field.
fields.label: Salesforce Asset ID

fields.description: Link to a generated PDF or Drive folder bundling As-Built, CO, serial list, and customer reference. Optional today; reserved for future automation.
fields.label: Handoff Packet URL

fields.description: Timestamp when the Instance was handed to Support (Salesforce Asset created, ownership transferred).
fields.label: Handed Off At

fields.description: Free-form. Use for any context that doesn't fit the structured fields.
fields.label: Notes

fields.description: Populated automatically by the backfill creation function. Records the provenance gap for pre-workflow units.
fields.label: Backfill Notes

fields.description: Serialized components in this unit. For backfill units, populated from on-site serial capture forms.
fields.label: Component Serials

fields.description: Retired tranches cannot allocate new serials. Used to preserve historical record of dead ranges (e.g., builders no longer in use).
fields.label: Status

fields.description: Human-readable label for this tranche, e.g., '2000 series', 'Builder Bravo first run'.
fields.label: Tranche Label

fields.description: Inclusive lower bound of this tranche (e.g., 2000).
fields.label: Tranche Start

fields.description: Inclusive upper bound of this tranche (e.g., 2999).
fields.label: Tranche End

fields.description: The next serial number to allocate. Increments atomically on allocation. Must be within [tranche_start, tranche_end].
fields.label: Next Serial

fields.description: Prefix for the formatted serial. Default 'IND' produces serials like IND-2042.
fields.label: Serial Prefix

fields.description: Free-form context. E.g., 'Builder offboarded 2026-03; tranche retired with 47 unallocated.'
fields.label: Notes

fields.description: Hierarchical tree of the configured BOM as resolved at snapshot generation. Frozen forever — does not reflect live BOM edits.
fields.label: Hierarchy

fields.description: BOM Depth (0 = Rolled)
fields.label: Level

fields.description: e.g., InductOne > Canopy > …
fields.label: Parent Path

fields.description: Why included/excluded (orientation/tags)
fields.label: Rule Reason

fields.description: Auto-populated from the linked InductOne Build. Blank for manually-generated packages.
fields.label: Builder
Explosion Mode
fields.options:
Follow Explicit Child BOM Links
Fallback to Default Active BOM

fields.description: This value becomes the immutable identifier of the option, and CANNOT be edited after creation.
fields.label: Option Code

fields.description: Human-readable option name used in InductOne Build selection lists and documentation.
fields.label: Option Name
Option Category
fields.options:
Cabling
Network
Power
Safety
Mounting
Electrical
Software
Pneumatic
Robot
Other

fields.description: Used for exclusivity (one-of grouping)
fields.label: Option Group

fields.description: If checked, exactly one option in this group must be selected before a configuration order can be generated.
fields.label: Group Selection Required

fields.description: If checked, this option will be auto-selected when the catalog is loaded onto a build. Only one option per group should have this set.
fields.label: Default Selection

fields.description: Inactive options should not be used for new builds.
fields.label: Active

fields.description: Manual indicator of whether Option Actions (mappings) fully represent this option.
fields.label: Mapping Completeness

fields.description: Defines how this option modifies the configured BOM (ADD/REMOVE/etc). Uses explicit Target Item and Expand Mode.
fields.label: Option Actions

fields.description: Optional context: why the option exists, caveats, and history. Not used for configuration execution.
fields.label: Catalog Notes (Internal)

fields.description:
Authoritative builder-facing description. Prints in the
Configuration Order release package. Use the lead paragraph,
then 'Configuration effect:' and 'Notes:' sections.
fields.label: Builder Description

fields.description: What this mapping does to the configured result.
fields.label: Action

fields.description: The Item this mapping targets. Expansion behavior is controlled by Expand Mode.
fields.label: Target Item

fields.description: When Action=REPLACE, remove Target Item (or its exploded children) and add this Item (or its exploded children depending on Expand Mode).
fields.label: Replace With Item
Structural Effect Mode
fields.options:
AUTO
NO_STRUCTURAL_CHANGE
SUPPRESS_TARGET_NODE
SUPPRESS_TARGET_BRANCH
REPLACE_TARGET_BRANCH
ADD_BRANCH
INCREMENT_NODE_QTY
OVERRIDE_NODE_QTY

fields.description:
AS_ITEM_ONLY: treat Target Item as a single line item.   

EXPLODE_DEFAULT_BOM: resolve Target Item’s default active BOM and explode its children into flat item lines.

USE_TARGET_BOM: explode the specific BOM linked in Target BOM field.
fields.label: Expand Mode

fields.description: Only required when Expand Mode is USE_TARGET_BOM.
fields.label: Target BOM

fields.description:
FIXED: use Qty Fixed below

FROM_SELECTION: take qty from the user's option selection record
fields.label: Qty Source

fields.description: Fixed quantity applied to Target Item (or to exploded children if expansion mode explodes).
fields.label: Qty Fixed

fields.description: Informational only (Phase 1). Used later if we implement parameterized selections.
fields.label: Parameter Key

fields.description:
Controls action application order. Lower executes first. Use 10/20/30 spacing for insertability.

Recommended convention:

10-19 = removals | 

20-29 = replacements | 

30-39 = qty overrides | 

40-49 = additions
fields.label: Row Order

fields.description: Internal row name for the Sales Order item (for audit/debug)
fields.label: Sales Order Item Row Name

fields.description: Optional: Human-friendly descriptor (site name, project, etc)
fields.label: Customer / Project Label

fields.description: The InductOne system item code on the Sales Order line.
fields.label: Top Item

fields.description: If blank, system resolves default active BOM for Top Item at time of generation.
fields.label: Top BOM

fields.description: Legacy compatibility; not used for phase 3 execution.
fields.label: Options CSV (Legacy)

fields.description: If PO is created outside of ERPnext initially, store the external reference here.
fields.label: Builder PO Reference

fields.description: The stenciled IND-#### identifier assigned to this build's physical unit. Allocated atomically from the builder's tranche when releasing to the builder. Read-only — never edit by hand.
fields.label: System Serial

fields.description: The Builder Tranche this build's system_serial was allocated from. Set at allocation time.
fields.label: Builder Tranche
Last Action
fields.options:
LOAD_CATALOG
GENERATE_SNAPSHOT
GENERATE_CONFIG_ORDER
RELEASE_TO_BUILDER
SET_SELECTED_SNAPSHOT
OPEN_SELECTED_SNAPSHOT
PREPARE_BUILDER_HANDOFF
OPEN_BOM_EXPORT_PACKAGE
RECORD_ACKNOWLEDGE
UPLOAD_COMPLETION

fields.description: Copy/paste this into a ticket. Contains doc context + stack + last payloads.
fields.label: Last Debug Bundle (JSON)

fields.description: Select an option from the InductOne configuration catalog. Option Actions will be applied during snapshot generation.
fields.label: Option

fields.description: If this option supports quantity/parameterization, store the user’s selected quantity here.
fields.label: Qty

fields.description: Optional freeform parameter
fields.label: Parameter Value

fields.description: Optional build-specific note for this selection.
fields.label: Notes
action
fields.options:
LOAD_CATALOG
GENERATE_SNAPSHOT
GENERATE_CONFIG_ORDER
RELEASE_TO_BUILDER
SET_SELECTED_SNAPSHOT
OPEN_SELECTED_SNAPSHOT
OPEN_BOM_EXPORT_PACKAGE
RECORD_ACKNOWLEDGE
PREPARE_BUILDER_HANDOFF
UPLOAD_COMPLETION
SYNC_HIERARCHY_WORKBOOK_TO_CO

fields.description: Human readable code, e.g. DAL-01, DAL-01-L02, DAL-01-L02-C03, DAL-01-L02-C03-RB
fields.label: Location Code

fields.description: Friendly label, e.g. “Dallas DC #1”, “Lane 2”, “Cell 3”, “Robot B
fields.label: Location Name

fields.description: Optional builder-side job, traveler, or reference number.
fields.label: Builder Reference

fields.description: Workbook label (e.g., 'Robot 1 Gripper Upper'). Populated automatically from the OPS-BLD-F01 workbook on upload. Item Code can be set manually later if the row maps to a catalog item.
fields.label: Component Label

fields.description: Workbook label (e.g., 'Robot 1 Gripper Upper'). Copied from the Build Completion serial row at acceptance.
fields.label: Component Label

fields.description:
ADD: quantity added

REMOVE: typically 0 (or the removed baseline qty if you want to be fancy later)

QTY_OVERRIDE: new final qty

REPLACE: use qty for what’s being added in Phase 3 semantics
fields.label: Qty

fields.description: Human-readable trace: which mapping / expand mode / target caused this
fields.label: Reason

fields.description:
ITEM: document is attached/associated with a specific Item

BOM: document is attached/associated with a BOM

OPTION: document tied to a specific option (useful for option-specific drawings)

MANUAL: freeform entry (external docs, emails, vendor PDFs, etc.)
fields.label: Source Type

fields.description:
ITEM: Item code

BOM: BOM name

OPTION: Option Code or Option Name

MANUAL: freeform identifier
fields.label: Source Name
Document Type
fields.options:
DRAWING
SCHEMATIC
SPEC
WORK_INSTRUCTION
CALIBRATION
SOFTWARE
OTHER

fields.description: Human Friendly Document Name
fields.label: Document Title

fields.description: Attach file directly to the configuration order if desired.
fields.label: File

fields.description: Lifecycle status of this Configuration Order. Set automatically by release and close-out actions.
fields.label: CO Status
fields.options:
Draft
Released
Awaiting Completion
Closed
Cancelled

fields.description: Mirror of the parent Build's system_serial. Set automatically at CO generation or at serial allocation, whichever comes first. Required before release.
fields.label: System Serial
Effect Mode
fields.options:
NO_STRUCTURAL_CHANGE
SUPPRESS_TARGET_NODE
SUPPRESS_TARGET_BRANCH
REPLACE_TARGET_BRANCH
ADD_BRANCH
INCREMENT_NODE_QTY
OVERRIDE_NODE_QTY
REPLACE_TARGET_NODE

Export & Push Fixtures runs bench export-fixtures, then commits and pushes any changes to the inductone_tools GitHub repo on main.

Requires github_pat in site_config.json. Idempotent across redeploys.

BOM
